title: Ghost Form prevents damage to equipped creature for two turn cycles

card.rawText: The equipped creature cannot be damaged for 2 turn cycles.

plan.title: Ghost Form prevents damage to equipped creature for two turn cycles
plan.summary: Equip Ghost Form and verify the equipped creature receives damage immunity rather than taking damage.

notes: Equip Ghost Form to player_1 primary creature.
The equipped creature cannot be damaged for 2 turn cycles.

steps: Verify damage immunity is active for 2 turn cycles.

expectedAssertions.label: Equipped creature has damage immunity status

manualVerification: Confirm the status expires after two full turn cycles and prevents all damage, not non-damage effects.
riskNotes: This fixture validates immunity application; battle damage prevention can be covered by a follow-up fixture if needed.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Run gen2_041_ghost_form-041-e01 through headless Gen 2 effect QA.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and card rules text remain source of truth.
